summary: Iteration 11 frontend testing completed successfully. All 5 requested features verified: Students page status dropdown (Active/Dropped/Inactive/Completed) visible and functional for Admin users, International Exams page loads correctly with booking management features, Pending Payments page shows correct total pending amount (₹34,334) with 3 individual pending items, Admin Panel System tab shows Reset button and Automated Tasks info.

issues: React hydration warning (span inside tbody/tr inside span) - cosmetic warning only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: StudentsPage.js lines 639-655: Status dropdown correctly conditionally renders for Admin/Branch Admin roles
ManageExamsPage.js loads correctly with stats cards and empty state handling
PendingPaymentsPage.js shows correct total pending calculation with individual installment/one-time payments
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: (1) Students page /students shows status dropdown with 4 options (Active/Dropped/Inactive/Completed) in Actions column for Admin role, (2) Manage Exams page /manage-exams loads with stats cards and booking table, (3) Pending Payments page /pending-payments shows 3 pending payments totaling ₹34,334 with filters and individual items, (4) Admin Panel /admin System tab shows Reset System Data button and Automated Tasks section with Fee Reminders at 9AM and Birthday Wishes at 8AM.

features_verified.Students page status dropdown for Admin/: VERIFIED - Dropdown visible in Actions column with options: Active, Dropped, Inactive, Completed
features_verified.Status dropdown allows changing student: VERIFIED - handleStatusChange function connected, dropdown functional
features_verified.International Exams page loads: VERIFIED - Page shows stats cards (Total Bookings, Pending, Confirmed, Completed, Total Revenue) and booking table
features_verified.Pending Payments page shows correct tota: VERIFIED - Shows Total Pending: 3 items, ₹34,334 with individual payment rows
features_verified.Admin Panel System tab: VERIFIED - Shows Reset button in Danger Zone and Automated Tasks info

students_status_dropdown.details: Status dropdown visible in Actions column for Admin role. Options: Active (default), Dropped, Inactive, Completed. Located at StudentsPage.js lines 639-655

manage_exams_page.details: Page loads at /manage-exams with title 'Manage Exams', subtitle 'View and manage international exam bookings'. Shows 5 stat cards and booking table with columns: Booking ID, Student, Exam, Price, Exam Date, Status, Actions

pending_payments_page.details: Page shows 3 summary cards (Total Pending: 3/₹34,334, Overdue: 0/₹0, Upcoming: 3/₹34,334), filter section, and table with 3 pending payment rows showing individual amounts

admin_system_tab.details: System tab shows: (1) Reset System Data section with Danger Zone warning and 'Reset All System Data' button, (2) Automated Tasks section showing Fee Reminders at 9:00 AM and Birthday Wishes at 8:00 AM
